title: zerna ramosa subsp. benekenii
intro: Zerna ramosa subsp. benekenii, also known as dwarf brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Zerna ramosa subsp. benekenii is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate respiratory symptoms and promote overall well-being.
